title: Order relative to authorizing the joint committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight to make an investigation and study of certain current Senate documents relative to the emergency assistance shelter system.

abstracts.abstract: Senate, January 15, 2026 -- The committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight, to whom was referred the petitions (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 2224) of Bruce E. Tarr and Steven George Xiarhos for legislation relative to the use of competitive bidding process for emergency shelter programs; (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 2225) of Bruce E. Tarr for legislation to create an Inspector General oversight of the Emergency Assistance Shelter system; and (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 2226) of Bruce E. Tarr for legislation to establish an emergency assistance shelter system oversight commission to continually evaluate all expenditures related to the system, report the accompanying Order  (Senate, No. 2910)

actions.description: Reported from the committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight
Accompanied by S2224, S2225 and S2226
Order reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

actions.description: Discharged to the committee on Senate Rules
